params.name: Cellular Pathology
params.description:
On Nov 25, 1858 AD, Rudolf Weirshaw finished the writing of Cellular Pathology.
The publication of Cellular Pathology signaled the division of Cellular Pathology and humoral pathology, laying the groundwork for modern medicine to understand the cause, process, and outcome of diseases. People began to directly observe the tissue lesions of the disease under a conventional optical microscope, which significantly improved the accuracy of diagnosis, contributing to the diagnoses of diseases and t …
